currentLinkedIn.headline: SDR at Personio | Booking Meetings for DACH Enterprise Sales | Munich
currentLinkedIn.about: I open doors. One year as an SDR at Personio, focused on DACH enterprise HR-tech buyers. I hit 115% of my meeting-booked quota last quarter.

experience.title: Sales Development Representative
bullets: Booked 68 qualified meetings in Q1 FY25 against a target of 60 — 113% attainment
Personalised multi-touch sequences for 200+ HR Director and VP targets per week in the DACH region
Converted 18% of cold LinkedIn connections into discovery calls through value-first messaging
